message.content:
<teammate-message teammate_id="luca-palmieri" color="blue" summary="Acknowledging Lea's review and glob clarification">
Thanks Lea. Good technical clarification on the `*.md` glob behavior — you're right that it only matches root-level files in GitHub Actions path patterns, so `docs/glossary.md` is covered by `docs/**`, not `*.md`. Both patterns are needed and they don't overlap. We're aligned.
</teammate-message>

content.text: Acknowledged. Nothing further to add — we're aligned on the implementation. Waiting for the remaining team members to confirm consensus.
